summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 25 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 73 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 34 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 26 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 3 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 36 days past due with 25 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **30 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $26,226 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 24 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** Overdue count is climbing — now at 13. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **20 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $13,594 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 7 days past due with 9 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **21 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 6 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **26 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 5 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 4. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **11 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $33,317 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. 2 tasks should be active right now but are stuck — identify and clear the blockers today. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.
**Angel Pacheco:** Carrying 9 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

247 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **126 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 35 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$86,342 in payments going out this week** across 47 tasks — make sure funds are available. $10,506 expected in from 1 client payment. Heavy week ahead for Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458) and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco's overdue has been growing over the past few days — now at 9. This needs to turn around today.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 9 overdue (oldest: 7d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **21 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 58 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 4 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 46 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 3 overdue — oldest first. 2 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 17 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Jeff: Jeff is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 5. Keep the momentum going.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 25 overdue (oldest: 36d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **30 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 40 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
Milagros Porturas: Milagros Porturas has 10 overdue across 2 projects with 2 tasks active.

**Ginger Brown:** 13 overdue (oldest: 24d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **11 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 24 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 13 overdue — oldest first. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **20 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** 6 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **26 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 36 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
